User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the JamaStore application, storing profile information and preferences for features like the size advisor and Telegram notifications.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: User's unique email address used for account creation.

telegramUsername.description: User's Telegram username for receiving automated notifications. (Relationship: User 1:1 TelegramBot)

heightCm.description: User's height in centimeters, used by the AI Smart Size Advisor.

weightKg.description: User's weight in kilograms, used by the AI Smart Size Advisor.

gender.description: User's self-declared gender, used by the AI Smart Size Advisor. (Possible values: 'male', 'female', 'other')

desiredFit.description: User's preferred clothing fit, used by the AI Smart Size Advisor. (Possible values: 'loose', 'regular', 'tight')

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

MediaAsset.title: MediaAsset
MediaAsset.description: Represents a media file, such as an image, uploaded for products or looks, with its metadata and public URL.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MediaAsset entity.

url.description: Public URL where the media asset can be accessed.

altText.description: Alternative text for the media asset, used for accessibility and SEO.

fileType.description: MIME type of the media file (e.g., 'image/jpeg', 'image/png').

width.description: Width of the image in pixels.

height.description: Height of the image in pixels.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the file in bytes.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the media asset was uploaded.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a distinct sellable clothing item available in the JamaStore catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit, a unique code for the product.

price.description: Current selling price of the product.

availableSizes.description: An array of available sizes for this product (e.g., 'S', 'M', 'L').

stockQuantity.description: Current number of units of this product available in stock.

mediaAssetIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities associated with this product. (Relationship: Product 1:N MediaAsset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was first added.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product information was last updated.

ProductTranslation.title: ProductTranslation
ProductTranslation.description: Provides localized details for a specific product in a given language.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductTranslation entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product entity this translation belongs to. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductTranslation)

languageCode.description: The language code for this translation (e.g., 'en' for English, 'uz' for Uzbek, 'ru' for Russian).

description.description: Translated and SEO-friendly description of the product, generated by AI.

material.description: Translated description of the product's material composition (e.g., '100% Cotton').

careInstructions.description: Translated care instructions for the product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this translation was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this translation was last updated.

Look.title: Look
Look.description: Represents a curated outfit or style, often comprising multiple products, displayed in the lookbook.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Look entity.

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the look, used for SEO and direct linking.

mediaAssetIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities showcasing this look. (Relationship: Look 1:N MediaAsset)

productIds.description: References to Product entities included in this look. (Relationship: Look N:N Product)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the look was created by an admin.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the look information was last updated.

LookTranslation.title: LookTranslation
LookTranslation.description: Provides localized display information for a specific look in a given language.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LookTranslation entity.

lookId.description: Reference to the Look entity this translation belongs to. (Relationship: Look 1:N LookTranslation)

languageCode.description: The language code for this translation (e.g., 'en' for English, 'uz' for Uzbek, 'ru' for Russian).

title.description: Translated title or name of the look.

description.description: Translated description of the look, adapting UI and content for each language, generated by AI.

seoKeywords.description: SEO-friendly keywords for the look, generated by AI for better discoverability.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this translation was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this translation was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's purchase transaction, tracking its status and details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed this order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

orderNumber.description: A human-readable, unique identifier for the order.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order.

shippingAddress.description: The full shipping address for the order.

paymentStatus.description: The status of the payment for this order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Paid', 'Failed').

telegramNotificationSent.description: Indicates if a Telegram notification for this order's status update has been sent.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order information or status was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product item included within a customer's order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased in this order item. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The number of units of the product purchased.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price of a single unit of the product at the time the order was placed.

size.description: The specific size of the product ordered (e.g., 'M', 'L').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order item was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles and preferences for features like the AI Smart Size Advisor. Authorization is strictly path-based; only the authenticated user (`request.auth.uid`) can read or write their own user document.

Contains the main catalog of sellable clothing items. Documents in this collection are publicly readable by all users. Write access (create, update, delete) is restricted to authenticated administrators.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific product.

definition.description: Stores localized details (name, description, material, care instructions) for a specific product. These documents are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to authenticated administrators.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent product.

params.name: languageCode
params.description: The language code (e.g., 'en', 'uz', 'ru') for this translation.

definition.description: Represents curated outfits or styles for the lookbook. Documents are publicly readable by all users. Write access is restricted to authenticated administrators.

params.name: lookId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific curated look.

definition.description: Provides localized display information (title, description, SEO keywords) for a specific look. These documents are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to authenticated administrators.

params.name: lookId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent look.

params.name: languageCode
params.description: The language code (e.g., 'en', 'uz', 'ru') for this translation.

definition.description: Stores metadata for uploaded media files (images). These documents are publicly readable. Write access (for uploads and management) is restricted to authenticated administrators.

params.name: mediaAssetId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific media asset.

definition.description: Records customer purchase transactions. Users can only read their own orders by verifying that `resource.data.userId` matches `request.auth.uid`. Write access is restricted to authenticated administrators. The `userId` field is denormalized to allow for Authorization Independence and QAPs for users.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific order.

definition.description: Details a single product item within an order. Each document MUST include the `userId` field denormalized from its parent `Order` document to ensure Authorization Independence. Users can only read their own order items by verifying `resource.data.userId` matches `request.auth.uid`. Write access is restricted to authenticated administrators.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific order item.

definition.description: A collection used for Database Access Control (DBAC) to designate global administrators. The existence of a document at `/roles_admin/{uid}` grants administrative privileges to the user with that UID. Read access is restricted to authenticated users to check their own role; write access should be tightly controlled (e.g., via Cloud Functions or a restricted admin UI) to assign/revoke roles.

params.name: uid
params.description: The unique user ID (UID) of an administrator.

firestore.reasoning:
The proposed Firestore structure prioritizes secure, scalable, and debuggable authorization by strictly adhering to the core design principles and mandates. 

**Authorization Independence:**
1.  **User Data:** User profiles are stored at `/users/{userId}`, leveraging path-based ownership where `request.auth.uid` directly corresponds to `userId`. This ensures authorization is self-contained within the path and document, requiring no external `get()` calls.
2.  **Public/Admin Data (Products, Looks, Media Assets, and their Translations):** Collections like `/products/{productId}`, `/looks/{lookId}`, and `/media_assets/{mediaAssetId}` (and their respective subcollections for translations) are designed for public read access and admin write access. Admin authorization is handled by checking for the existence of a document in the global `/roles_admin/{uid}` collection, which is an independent check.
3.  **Order-related Data:** Orders (`/orders/{orderId}`) and their items (`/orders/{orderId}/items/{orderItemId}`) present a common authorization challenge. To achieve Authorization Independence for users, each `Order` document explicitly includes `userId` of the purchasing user. For `OrderItem` documents, the `userId` from the parent `Order` *must be denormalized* and stored directly within each `OrderItem` document. This allows security rules for `OrderItem` to evaluate `resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid` without performing a `get()` operation on the parent `Order` document, making transactions and batch writes atomic and rules simpler to debug. This denormalization is critical for order items and enables secure `list` operations.

**Query-based Access Patterns (QAPs):**
1.  **Public Data:** `products`, `looks`, and `media_assets` collections are designed for straightforward public `list` operations with `allow read` rules.
2.  **User-Owned Data:** The `/users/{userId}` path intrinsically supports QAPs as `list` operations on this path for an authenticated user will only return their own data. 
3.  **Orders:** For users to query their orders, rules will enforce that any `list` operation on `/orders` *must* include a `where('userId', '==', request.auth.uid)` filter. The presence of the `userId` field in the `Order` documents directly supports this QAP, preventing unauthorized `list` access by users attempting to query all orders.
4.  **Order Items:** Similarly, `list` operations on `/orders/{orderId}/items` for a regular user will be secured by ensuring the denormalized `userId` within the `OrderItem` document matches `request.auth.uid`. This allows the user to query items only for orders they own, while admins can list all items.

**Structural Segregation and Access Modeling:**
*   Collections like `users`, `products`, `looks`, `media_assets`, and `orders` maintain a homogeneous security posture within their primary level, simplifying rules. Translations are nested as subcollections, continuing the hierarchical pattern.
*   Path-based ownership is utilized for `users`.
*   For `products` and `looks`, translation subcollections (`/translations/{languageCode}`) allow for multi-language support without mixing different security concerns within the parent entity. Both parent and child collections have public read/admin write access.
*   Admin roles are handled via a dedicated top-level collection (`/roles_admin/{uid}`), using `exists()` checks for efficient and clear role-based access control.
